---
title: "gruppemde_uge_3"
subtitle: "`gruppemde_uge_3`"
description: "gruppemde_uge_3"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/gruppemde_uge_3/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                     | Title                                  | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                             |
|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                  | The unique name of the event           | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                      |
| `center`                                 | Research center                        | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                   |
| `date_group_meeting_3`                   | date_group_meeting_3                   | date   | Date for group meeting. Group meeting week 3.                                                                                                           |
| `staff_initials_group_meeting_3`         | staff_initials_group_meeting_3         | string | Initials of the dietitian responsible for conducting the group meeting. Group meeting week 3.                                                           |
| `attended_group_meeting_3`               | attended_group_meeting_3               | string | Indicates participant's attendance to the group meeting. Group meeting week 3.                                                                          |
| `weight_group_meeting_3`                 | weight_group_meeting_3                 | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in room 1.15. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Group meeting week 3. |
| `cgm_plan_not_attended_group_meeting_3`  | cgm_plan_not_attended_group_meeting_3  | string | Participant contacted regarding return of the CGM sensor. Return plan established. Group meeting 3.                                                     |
| `cgm_returned_group_meeting_3`           | cgm_returned_group_meeting_3           | string | Whether the CGM has been returned. Group meeting week 3.                                                                                                |
| `cgm_when_group_meeting_3`               | cgm_when_group_meeting_3               | string | If not, note the date that it will be returned. Group meeting 3.                                                                                        |
| `cgm_discontinue_group_meeting_3`        | cgm_discontinue_group_meeting_3        | string | Indicates whether the CGM was taken off/ fell off before the planned measuring period was over. Group meeting 3.                                        |
| `cgm_discontinue_why_group_meeting_3`    | cgm_discontinue_why_group_meeting_3    | string | Indicates why and when the CGM was taken off/ fell off. Group meeting 3.                                                                                |
| `cgm_when_info_group_meeting_3`          | cgm_when_info_group_meeting_3          | string | Write to the responsible trial physician when the CGM device will be received. Group meeting 3.                                                         |
| `cgm_reader_group_meeting_3`             | cgm_reader_group_meeting_3             | string | Use the same reader as used at group meeting 1. Group meeting 3. Derived using the formula: [fase_1_arm_1][cgmreader_group_meeting_1]                   |
| `libreview_group_meeting_3`              | libreview_group_meeting_3              | string | Whether the data has been uploaded to LibreView. Group meeting 3.                                                                                       |
| `cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_group_meeting_3`    | cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_group_meeting_3    | string | Cgm data in csv-file saved on L-drive. Workflow. Group meeting 3.                                                                                       |
| `cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_group_meeting_3`    | cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_group_meeting_3    | string | AGP rapport with cmg data saved on L-drive. Group meeting 3.                                                                                            |
| `cgm_glucosedata_upload_group_meeting_3` | cgm_glucosedata_upload_group_meeting_3 | string | Upload of cgm data (csv-file). Group meeting 3.                                                                                                         |
| `cgm_avg_group_meeting_3`                | cgm_avg_group_meeting_3                | number | Average glucose measured by CGM. Mmol/L. Group meeting 3.                                                                                               |
| `remarks_group_meeting_3`                | remarks_group_meeting_3                | string | Indicates whether there are any special remarks regarding the participant and what they are. Group meeting week 3.                                      |

: Fields in the `gruppemde_uge_3` resource.
